---
title: "Biostatistics Assignment"
author: "Jolene Wium"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: false
    theme: cosmo
    df-print: paged
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    keep-tex: false
    fig-width: 7
    fig-height: 4.5
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
jupyter: python3
editor: visual
---
